first_run.rationale: The score is identical between the baseline and the variant, and the reasoning in all sections (justification, strengths, concerns) is substantively the same. Both evaluations correctly identify that the candidate's recent experience is in TypeScript/Node.js/DLang and that they lack specific, current experience in the required Java/Spring/IDE tooling. The minor differences in wording are consistent with normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any reliance on the redacted name or personal URLs.
